summary: Dynatrace and APM monitoring engineer with deep experience supporting enterprise observability platforms, synthetic monitoring, telemetry pipelines, dashboards, alerts, and operational reporting. Strong background with Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, Python automation, and production-support collaboration. Experienced improving operational readiness by turning monitoring data into actionable dashboards, thresholds, and reporting workflows.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Observability Engineer
bullets: Built automated telemetry ingestion and reporting pipelines using Python/Pandas for 6,000+ monitored endpoints, improving operational visibility and reducing manual reporting effort.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting layers for capacity, performance, and incident-readiness analysis.
Developed dashboards and reporting workflows used by senior stakeholders to monitor capacity trends, infrastructure performance, and operational risk.
Supported enterprise monitoring, capacity, and performance initiatives across distributed banking infrastructure, partnering with application, infrastructure, and operations teams.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical hospitality production systems.
Implemented End-User Monitoring (EUM) and transaction tracing across web and mobile platforms to improve application performance visibility.
Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 with TLS 1.2 enforcement and zero regression in production monitoring.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed enterprise CA APM environments supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and custom Management Modules adopted as monitoring standards across client environments.
Led major CA APM upgrade initiatives with zero unplanned downtime while coordinating cross-functional infrastructure and application teams.
Built Perl/Ksh scripts for automated performance data extraction and recurring operational reporting.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Observability & APM: Dynatrace (AppMon, Synthetics, EUM/RUM, Transaction Tracing), BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics
skills.Monitoring Operations: Dashboards, Alerts, Thresholds, SLA Reporting, Telemetry Analysis, Incident Readiness, Production Support Collaboration, Monitoring Documentation
skills.Languages & Automation: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Platforms & Infrastructure: Linux/Unix, AWS (Glue, Athena, S3, Redshift), Docker, Git, Airflow
skills.Data & Reporting: Telemetry Pipelines, ETL Automation, Data Warehousing, Streamlit, PySpark
skills.Legacy: C++, Java, PL/SQL, Oracle RAC, WebLogic / WebSphere

projects.name: FAST Project
projects.description: Data-mined real-user performance metrics using Dynatrace and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify application optimization opportunities and improve operational performance visibility.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity & Telemetry Analytics Platform
projects.description: Built telemetry analytics workflows and dashboards supporting infrastructure visibility, forecasting, capacity analysis, and operational reporting across enterprise systems.
